DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-18-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS JEAN COLVIN, BAHARAT K. RAWAL, TRUSTEES OF THE COLVIN-RAWAL LIVING TRUST'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: demurrer overruled. Defendant shall answer Complaint in 10 days. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/MJM) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Reporter: Loretta Najera CSR#5153
